CREATE TABLE documents (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content TEXT, is_xml BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO documents (id, content, is_xml) VALUES (1, '<root><data>XML Document 1</data></root>', TRUE);
INSERT INTO documents (id, content, is_xml) VALUES (2, 'Text Document 1', FALSE);
INSERT INTO documents (id, content, is_xml) VALUES (3, 'Text Document 2', FALSE);
INSERT INTO documents (id, content, is_xml) VALUES (4, '<root><data>XML Document 2</data></root>', TRUE);
INSERT INTO documents (id, content, is_xml) VALUES (5, 'Text Document 3', FALSE);
SELECT * FROM documents WHERE is_xml = TRUE;
SELECT * FROM documents WHERE is_xml = FALSE;
SELECT d1.content AS xml_content, d2.content AS text_content FROM documents d1 JOIN documents d2 ON d1.id = d2.id WHERE d1.is_xml = TRUE AND d2.is_xml = FALSE;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS word_count FROM documents GROUP BY id HAVING word_count > 1;
SELECT d.content FROM documents d WHERE d.is_xml = TRUE AND d.id IN (SELECT id FROM documents WHERE is_xml = FALSE);
UPDATE documents SET content = 'Updated Text Document 2' WHERE id = 3;
INSERT INTO documents (id, content, is_xml) VALUES (6, '<root><data>XML Document 3</data></root>', TRUE);
SELECT d.id, d.content FROM documents d WHERE d.is_xml = TRUE AND d.id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM documents WHERE is_xml = FALSE);
